token: your Discord Bots Token found in your Discord Developr Portable
clientId: your Discord Bots Client ID found in your Discord Develor Portable
guildId: The ID Number of the Guild you want to deploy the bot in. Can be found by enabling Developer Mode in Discord
DB_URI: The URL to the MongoDB Database for the bot
CHANNELS_DB: The name of the MongoDB Collection to stoer channel informaiton
SUBMISSIONS_DB: The name of the MongoDB Collection to store response information
ADMIN_ROLE_ID: The ID number for the discord role you want to mark as admin. Used to restrict the use of some slash commands
iCalAddress: URL of the iCal address you want the bot to read from
openweathertoken: OpenWeatherAPI Token to get weather reports
